scores.correctness_notes: Core test code matches gold standard exactly: temp_model fixture, deploy, wait with all_active. Also correctly includes error= and timeout= params mentioned in gold standard key facts.
scores.hallucination_notes: juju.status() return value structure (status.apps['my-charm'].status == 'active') and juju.integrate() are not confirmed by gold standard. The attribute access pattern on the status object may not reflect the actual jubilant API. Minor issue, not a clear fabrication but not verified.
